def negative_numpy_vstack_hstack_in_loop():
    rule_id = "numpy_vstack_hstack_in_loop"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Arrays are repeatedly stacked inside loops instead of collected and stacked once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
